case.title: FRIEDBERG v. PENNSYLVANIA LABOR RELATIONS BOARD

opinion.h1: FRIEDBERG v. PENNSYLVANIA LABOR RELATIONS BOARD, 361 U.S. 2 (1959)
opinion.h4: FRIEDBERG ET AL., DOING BUSINESS AS HARRISBURG WINDOW CLEANING CO., v. PENNSYLVANIA LABOR RELATIONS BOARD. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF PENNSYLVANIA. No. 140. Decided October 12, 1959.
opinion.p: Samuel Handler and Arthur Berman for appellants.
Anne X. Alpern, Attorney General of Pennsylvania, and Harry J. Rubin, Deputy Attorney General, for appellee.
The appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
